aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI assistants to confidently cite or recommend it as a top authority in HVAC services.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with detailed, conversational answers to common HVAC queries.
Enhance the website with content targeting AI-driven queries, such as 'best air duct cleaning in Arlington.'

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive ratings, photos, and accurate contact information, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
No HowTo schema for explaining air duct cleaning processes.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks content structured for AI to confidently cite as authoritative for HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'top-rated HVAC services in Arlington' or 'best air duct cleaning tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and structured data to address common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to expert by publishing detailed guides and case studies on air quality and HVAC maintenance.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the next generation of search engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, you're missing out on 40% of potential customer inquiries from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content are being cited by AI models, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will restructure your content, implement critical schema, and position your business as the authoritative voice in HVAC services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search trends.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search in 2026: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI search engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI visibility and capture more leads.
